creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
A few days ago I could start the browser but it was without SSL support, bug 232306 …

… now, it will not start: 

[grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-hpelitebook8570p-freebsd] ~% pkg query '%o %v %R' otter-browser
www/otter-browser 0.9.99.3 poudriere
[grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-hpelitebook8570p-freebsd] ~% pkg query '%o %v %R' qt5-network
net/qt5-network 5.11.2 poudriere
[grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-hpelitebook8570p-freebsd] ~% uname -v
FreeBSD 12.0-ALPHA9 r339356 GENERIC-NODEBUG 
[grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-hpelitebook8570p-freebsd] ~% otter-browser
Fontconfig warning: "/usr/local/etc/fonts/local.conf", line 1093: saw number, expected matrix
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
[grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-hpelitebook8570p-freebsd] ~%
